title: During a flight to Manaus-AM a pilot reported a continuous UFO sighting [1994]
excerpt: Military internal communication report informing the sighting of an unidentified flying object by a pilot with the transcription of the report by the ACC-MU. 1 – Synthesis of occurrences with unidentified flying objects. – VRG 302, from Santarém to Manaus, reported having seen a luminous object between 140NM and 50NM in Manaus. – The appendix, part.n9-033 […]
text_preview:
Military internal communication report informing the sighting of an unidentified flying object by a pilot with the transcription of the report by the ACC-MU.

1 – Synthesis of occurrences with unidentified flying objects.

– VRG 302, from Santarém to Manaus, reported having seen a luminous object between 140NM and 50NM in Manaus.

– The appendix, part.n9-033 / ATS, with the transcription of the report in the book of occurrence of the ÀCC-MU, contains further details of the fact.

2 – GENERAL OBSERVATIONS CONCERNING INFORMATION:

The information regarding the flyover authorization was acquired
summary: Pilot of VRG302 tracked a luminous UFO from 140NM to 70NM from Manaus; object not captured on onboard or ground radar on Sept 6, 1994.
